<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Domain Offensive (do.de)](https://www.do.de/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/dode/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "dode"
  dnsCredentials:
    # DODE_TOKEN: API token
    token: ""
    # DODE_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # DODE_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # DODE_SEQUENCE_INTERVAL: Time between sequential requests in seconds (Default: 60)
    sequenceInterval: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
